Input.name: customMods
Input.string: Approx Damage shield: 25% more damage 100% less damage over time

PathOfBuilding.Notes:
Respec needs:
- 4-Link (has to be RRGB) - decent wand (flat ele dmg, Spell dmg, open prefix for craft) Blasting Wand base is Lvl40, so you can wait a little with the respec - Minimum Lvl 38 for Greater Volley - Library: Wrath, Kinetic Fusillade, Less Duration
